title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Murder
summary: Trump incorrectly claimed the suspect in a Charlotte murder case came through open borders; the suspect is a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the spread of misinformation and its potential impact on public perception of immigration issues.

title: Hayward Pool Filter Plant a Major Employer in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based swimming pool filter maker, is the largest private employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the economic importance of manufacturing companies in smaller North Carolina towns.

title: Charlotte Trade Shows Focus on Brand Visibility and ROI
summary: Exhibitors at trade shows in Charlotte, NC, are prioritizing flexibility, visibility, and return on investment.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the evolving strategies businesses are using to maximize their impact at trade events.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President in Charlotte, NC
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is seeking a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment activity within the private equity sector in Charlotte.

title: Florence Airport Passenger Numbers Rise Despite Losing Charlotte Flight
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost its American Airlines flight to Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the challenges and opportunities for regional airports in maintaining and expanding service.

title: Women Charged in Torture and Death of Girl in Charlotte, NC
summary: Three women are charged with torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate at a Charlotte home.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a horrific case of child abuse and the urgent need for child protective services.

title: Daylight Saving Time Change Causes Disruption and Health Concerns
summary: The upcoming clock change is expected to cause angst, lost sleep, and health issues for many.
charlotte_impact: Draws attention to the ongoing debate about the impact and necessity of daylight saving time.

title: Man Sentenced to Life for 1994 Rape in Charlotte
summary: A man was sentenced to life in prison after being convicted of the 1994 rape of a Charlotte woman.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the long arm of the law and the pursuit of justice for past crimes.

title: Mecklenburg County Mugshots Released for March 5th
summary: Mugshots from Mecklenburg County for Thursday, March 5th, are now available for review.

title: Silfab Plant Halted After Chemical Spill, School Closed

title: Goodwill Bridal Pop-Up Sale Offers Affordable Gowns

title: Severe Weather Preparedness Week: Flooding Dangers
summary: The leading cause of avoidable death during severe weather in the Carolinas is driving through flooded roadways.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of heeding warnings and avoiding flooded areas during severe weather events.
